match.userMessage:
9-panel cinematic storyboard sheet derived from Image 1. Mix Wide, Medium, and Tight shots of the same scene. No borders between panels.

Layout: 3x3 grid (9 panels) in a 16:9 landscape image.

Scene: Dynamic handheld shot in modern social-first product photography style with bright natural window light, SCARLETT wearing light casual beach clothing suitable for walking and carrying a canvas tote bag stands at the open window inside the bright Bondi studio, holding the (CORAL_LIPSTICK) and swiping across her lips in one quick motion with muscles tensed and mid-breath energy, pale marble vanity table visible beside her, expansive ocean view through the open window, crisp white surfaces throughout the modern coastal interior, direct sunlight slicing across the marble creating clean directional shadows and high-key airy atmosphere, shallow depth of field with gentle bokeh on the background ocean, eye-level camera angle emphasizing the real-life interaction, clean bright color grading with true-to-life tones and lifted shadows

Match Image 1 exactly: same character(s) (face, hair, skin, clothing), lighting, color grade, and texture. If character reference sheets are provided, use them for likeness — do not render them as separate panels.

No text, dialogue bubbles, scene numbers, or watermarks.


  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [PRIMARY SOURCE]: Primary source scene — generate 9 variant shots from this image
    - Image 2 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 3 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - DAY
    - Image 4 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - A slim metallic lipstick tube containing a vivid bright coral bullet
    
    IMPORTANT: Character, location, and element reference images are for IDENTITY CONSISTENCY ONLY. Do NOT reproduce them as separate panels or subjects. Elements (logos, products) must render faithfully when referenced but should appear naturally within the scene. All output panels must depict the scene from the PRIMARY SOURCE image.
  </reference-images>
